---
name: Private security report
about: Do not file public vulnerability reports
title: "[SECURITY] Do not submit public details"
labels: ["security", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

Do not include vulnerability details in this public issue.

Use the most private channel available:

1. GitHub private vulnerability reporting, if enabled on the affected repository.
2. Email `phil@smarthausgroup.com` with `SECURITY` in the subject line.

If you already placed sensitive material in a public issue, remove it if GitHub
allows you to edit it and notify maintainers immediately.
